channel.title: Make Some Noise
channel.description: Latest releases from Make Some Noise on Dropout.tv

item.title: Lou, Ross, and Jiavani Drink Your Milkshake
item.description:
Lou, Ross, and Jiavani sing some Christian rock and rant about dinner choices.

Duration: 35:17

Tags: Make Some Noise, sam reich, game shows, sound effects, competitions, impressions, improv, imitation, lou wilson, ross bryant, jiavani
